summary: Workflow runs aggregator.sh twice (lines 21-24 and 26-40 in verification)—second invocation should read from already-generated aggregate-output.md. Script follows bash best practices: set -euo pipefail, proper trap cleanup, quoted variables, meaningful errors. However, XML parsing (tr+sed) could fail with newlines in attribute values. jq dependency installed at start but never validated when script executes. Duplication and robustness gaps reduce maintainability despite sound core logic.
